description: Bounded 512-token context recall bucket: synthetic numbered facts with one embedded audit code at ~60% depth; greedy completion must recall it. Prompt sized by reference tokenization (BOS + plain text).

prompts.text: Context block start. Fact 01: llama records deterministic tokens. Fact 02: vicuna checks bounded context. Fact 03: guanaco preserves exact rows. Fact 04: camel audits public summaries. Fact 15: argali matches clean checkouts. Fact 16: urial verifies wire checksums. Fact 17: mouflon stores layer plans. Fact 18: addax tracks greedy parity. Fact 19: oryx guards pinned oracles. Fact 20: the audit code is CMLD-512. Fact 21: llama records deterministic tokens. Fact 22: vicuna checks bounded context. Fact 23: guanaco preserves exact rows. Fact 24: camel audits public summaries. Fact 25: dromedary matches clean checkouts. Fact 26: tapir verifies wire checksums. Fact 27: capybara stores layer plans. Fact 28: ibex tracks greedy parity. Fact 29: markhor guards pinned oracles. Fact 30: saiga keeps blue evidence. Fact 31: chamois records deterministic tokens. Fact 32: serow checks bounded context. Fact 33: goral preserves exact rows. Fact 34: takin audits public summaries. Context block end. The audit code hidden in fact 20 is the answer. Question: respond with ONLY the audit code from fact 20, formatted as CMLD-<number>.
